track.name: I Am, She Is, We Are

wiki.summary: “I Am, She Is, We Are” is the first track on Fête de la Vanille a song that was first teased on August 17, 2024, through Lucy Bedroque’s burner accounts, “glutmother” and “syxxru” under the working titles PLEASE WEAR YOUR GUTS and WHERE IS YOUR BACKBONE, with the snippet “PLEASE WEAR YOUR GUTS” being posted on SoundCloud and deleted quickly after, and “WHERE IS YOUR BACKBONE” being posted on lucy’s instragram story, Bedroque then shared a teaser tweet on September 20, 2024, featuring this snippet of lyrics Read more on Last.fm.
